title: Game Character Stats
description: Allows you to have (admittedly inaccurate) stats from game characters!
body:
**MOD IS A W.I.P**

Allows you to have some (probably inaccurate) stats from some characters from games, Some may be missing or replaced due to possible copyright issues

Said stats can give you stuff like higher fall resistance/imunity or higher jumps (Niko)
or stronger attacks the higher level you get (Frisk), And in the future may have items that you can use with specific characters

I also got plans for if on hardcore you can get multible lives (should be out on 2.1.?)

## Includes:
- Niko (Released 1.0.0
- Frisk (Releasing 2.0.0)

## Items:
- Orbs to change character (or vanity characters HOWEVER this has none currently)

## Enchantments:
- Ability Leaking (leaks some fist only abilitys into your weapons)

You can check what character you have on the top right of your screen, You can also level up your character to strengthen your abilitys cause why not?
This also has advancements for reaching a specific level on characters

Apologies if stuff is misspelt or inconsistant

# Credits:
- **Ayofied, New Frisk And Chara Sprites (Version 2.1.1**

# IP Owners:
- **Future Cat LLC (Oneshot IP)**
- **Toby Fox (Undertale and DELTARUNE IP)**
